name: Dispatch Field Service Management API
what_it_does: Dispatch field service management and contractor network REST API for work order management, contractor dispatch, and home warranty claim service orchestration. Enables AI agents to manage work order creation and service provider assignment for home warranty claim service automation, handle contractor network matching and availability scheduling for field service dispatch automation, access customer appointment scheduling and communication for service scheduling automation, retrieve work order status and completion tracking for home warranty claim status automation, manage service estimate and work authorization for field service approval automation, handle technician mobile workflow and job documentation for field paperwork automation, access service provider performance rating and quality scoring for network quality management automation, retrieve parts ordering and procurement for repair parts fulfillment automation, manage customer satisfaction survey and NPS collection for service quality automation, and integrate Dispatch with home warranty companies, property management systems, and insurance platforms for embedded field service orchestration.
use_cases: Dispatching service claims from home warranty automation agents
Scheduling contractors from property management agents
Tracking work orders from field service visibility agents
Rating service pros from quality management agents
not_for: Last-mile retail delivery (use Bringg or Onfleet)
Enterprise IT field service and break-fix (use ServiceNow FSM)
best_when: A home warranty company, home services platform, or property manager wanting AI agents to automate service claim dispatch, contractor matching, work order management, and customer scheduling through Dispatch's contractor network and field service platform.
avoid_when: CONTRACTOR LICENSE VERIFICATION FOR REGULATED TRADES: Automated contractor dispatch via Dispatch for regulated home service trades (plumbing, electrical, HVAC) must verify state trade license currency and liability insurance; automated dispatch of unverified or unlicensed contractor creates homeowner safety and legal liability. HOME WARRANTY COVERAGE SCOPE BEFORE WORK AUTHORIZATION: Automated work authorization via Dispatch for home warranty claims must verify item is covered under warranty before approving contractor work; automated work authorization without coverage verification creates warranty liability for non-covered repair. CUSTOMER DATA SHARING FOR CONTRACTOR DISPATCH: Automated customer address and contact sharing with contractor network via Dispatch must implement minimum necessary data sharing; avoid sharing additional customer PII (financial, medical, household) beyond address and contact for dispatch; unnecessary data sharing creates privacy risk in contractor mobile workflow.

auth.notes: Dispatch uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2012 by Justin Moodley. Private (~$35M raised). Field service management and contractor network for home warranty, utilities, and property management. Work order management, contractor dispatch, customer scheduling. Home warranty company integrations (American Home Shield, Choice Home Warranty). Property management integrations. Competes with ServicePower, Mize, and ServiceBench for home warranty service management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per work order pricing for home warranty and service platform clients
pricing.paid_tiers: Per work order fee; enterprise subscription for high-volume home warranty and platform clients; API access included in enterprise engagement
pricing.notes: Boston MA. Private. Founded 2012. Per work order pricing. Enterprise subscription for high-volume clients. Home warranty and property management focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; work order and dispatch queries throttled; webhooks for work order and appointment events

known_agent_gotchas: HOME WARRANTY COVERAGE VERIFICATION BEFORE AUTHORIZATION: Automated work authorization for home warranty claims via Dispatch must verify item coverage against warranty policy terms before approving contractor repair; automated authorization without coverage check creates warranty claim outside scope and warranty company financial liability

CONTRACTOR NETWORK CAPACITY IN HIGH-DEMAND SEASONS: Dispatch contractor network capacity varies by geography and season; automated dispatch in high-demand periods (HVAC summer peak, heating winter peak) may encounter reduced contractor availability; implement availability pre-check and fallback contractor pool for peak season dispatch

PARTS PROCUREMENT AUTOMATION AUTHORIZATION THRESHOLD: Automated parts ordering via Dispatch for repair work must implement cost authorization threshold; automated parts procurement above pre-approved cost limit without client approval creates unauthorized expense; configure per-client parts authorization limit in automated workflow

CUSTOMER CONTACT TIMING FOR SCHEDULING COMPLIANCE: Automated customer scheduling outreach via Dispatch must comply with TCPA timing restrictions (no calls before 8am or after 9pm local time); automated scheduling notification without time zone and TCPA compliance check creates TCPA violation

WORK ORDER IDEMPOTENCY ON WEBHOOK RETRY: Dispatch work order status webhooks may deliver on retry; automated downstream home warranty claim update triggered by work order webhook must implement idempotency on work order ID to prevent duplicate claim status updates

API KEY NO SCOPE GRANULARITY: Dispatch API key authentication provides full account access without fine-grained scope; implement dedicated read-only API key for monitoring and analytics agents; use privileged API key only for write operations (work order creation, authorization)
agent_readiness.security_notes: Field service management. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer home address, contractor data, and work order information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Field service dispatch. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Customer home address, contractor, and work order data.
